title: Resetting a password
question: How can a customer reset their password?
answer: Customers can use the forgot password link on the sign in page. They will receive an email with a secure reset link.

title: Tracking an order
question: How can a customer track an order?
answer: Customers can track an order from the order history page or by using the tracking link sent in the shipping email.

title: Updating billing details
question: How can a customer update billing details?
answer: Customers can update billing details from account settings under the billing section.

title: Changing shipping address
question: Can a customer change the shipping address?
answer: Customers can change the shipping address before the order is shipped. After shipping, they should contact the carrier.

title: Finding refund status
question: How can a customer check refund status?
answer: Customers can check refund status from the order details page. Refunds may take a few business days after approval.
